text:
Hi Edwin,

My name is Alex Deiter, i'm  maintainer of port net/ris:

# New ports collection makefile for:    ris
# Date created:         3 September 2005
# Whom:                 Alex Deiter <tiamat@komi.mts.ru>

But now, my address has been changed (from  tiamat@komi.mts.ru to
alex.deiter@gmail.com) and I can not answer from the address
tiamat@komi.mts.ru.

You can search my PR's via
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr-summary.cgi?category=&severity=&priority=&class=&state=&sort=none&text=&responsible=&multitext=&originator=deiter&closedtoo=on&release=

Thanks a lot!
